name: Hoernchen
recipeIngredient: Red and green colored sugar, tiny multicolored candies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and sugar.
2. Add egg and vanilla, blend well.
3. Stir in flour and ground almonds.
4. Pinch off a piece of dough the size of a walnut and roll into a strip about the thickness of your little finger.
5. Form into a crescent shape.
6. Dip one side of the crescent into colored sugar or multicolored candies.
7. Place the uncoated side down on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 15 minutes, or until slightly brown.
